attributes.name: [NVIDIA GPU OTel] Clock frequency throttled under load

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-nvidia_gpu.otel-default
| WHERE DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK IS NOT NULL
    AND DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL IS NOT NULL
    AND DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    avg_sm_clock = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK),
    max_sm_clock = MAX(DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK),
    avg_util = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL),
    avg_temp = AVG(DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP)
  BY Hostname, UUID, modelName
// Detect throttling: GPU is under load (>50% util) but clock is low
// relative to its observed max — indicates thermal or power throttling
// Adjust the clock ratio threshold based on your GPU model's expected boost clocks
| WHERE avg_util > 50 AND max_sm_clock > 0
| EVAL clock_ratio = ROUND(avg_sm_clock / max_sm_clock * 100.0, 2)
| WHERE clock_ratio < 70
| SORT clock_ratio ASC
